revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:November 26 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of November 26 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦11月26日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の26日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[応徳]]3年<!--（[[1086年]]_月_日）--> - [[白河天皇]]が8歳の[[堀河天皇]]に譲位。以後43年間[[上皇]]として[[院政]]を行う * [[治承]]4年<!--（[[1180年]]_月_日）--> - [[平清盛]]が都を福原から[[平安京]]に戻す * [[正元]]元年<!--（[[1259年]]_月_日）--> - [[後深草天皇]]が、父である[[後嵯峨上皇]]により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]]）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]]と[[持明院統]]に分裂 * [[文禄]]2年<!--（[[1593年]]_月_日）--> - 後陽成天皇の勅命により『古文孝経』（慶長勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製活字本
== 誕生日 == * [[安永]]9年<!--（[[1780年]]_月_日）--> - [[黒住宗忠]]、[[黒住教]]始祖（+ [[1850年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月25日 (旧暦)|11月25日]] 翌日[[11月27日 (旧暦)|11月27日]] - 前月[[10月26日 (旧暦)|10月26日]] 翌月[[12月26日 (旧暦)|12月26日]] *新暦[[11月26日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== できごと == * [[応徳]]3年<!--（[[1086年]]_月_日）--> - [[白河天皇]]が8歳の[[堀河天皇]]に譲位。以後43年間[[上皇]]として[[院政]]を行う * [[治承]]4年<!--（[[1180年]]_月_日）--> - [[平清盛]]が都を福原から[[平安京]]に戻す * [[正元]]元年<!--（[[1259年]]_月_日）--> - [[後深草天皇]]が、父である[[後嵯峨上皇]]により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]]）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]]と[[持明院統]]に分裂 * [[文禄]]2年<!--（[[1593年]]_月_日）--> - 後陽成天皇の勅命により『古文孝経』（慶長勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製活字本
== 誕生日 == * [[安永]]9年<!--（[[1780年]]_月_日）--> - [[黒住宗忠]]、[[黒住教]]始祖（+ [[1850年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月25日 (旧暦)|11月25日]] 翌日[[11月27日 (旧暦)|11月27日]] - 前月[[10月26日 (旧暦)|10月26日]] 翌月[[12月26日 (旧暦)|12月26日]] *新暦[[11月26日]]
{{stub}}

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月26日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の26日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[応徳]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1087年]][[1月3日]]） - [[白河天皇]]が8歳の[[堀河天皇]]に譲位。以後43年間[[上皇]]として[[院政]]を行う * [[治承]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1180年]][[12月14日]]） - [[平清盛]]が都を福原から[[平安京]]に戻す * [[正元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1260年]][[1月9日]]） - [[後深草天皇]]が、父である[[後嵯峨上皇]]により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]]）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]]と[[持明院統]]に分裂 * [[文禄]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1594年]][[1月17日]]） - [[後陽成天皇]]の勅命により『[[古文孝経]]』（慶長勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]]本
== 誕生日 == * [[安永]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1780年]][[12月21日]]） - [[黒住宗忠]]、[[黒住教]]始祖（+ [[1850年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

{{stub}}

== 誕生日 == * [[安永]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1780年]][[12月21日]]） - [[黒住宗忠]]、[[黒住教]]始祖（+ [[1850年]]）

'''November 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] marking all the pages that are not butsumetsu so I can use process of elimination to tag all Butsumetsu pages using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
'''November 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar November}} ''November 26'''<!--Lunar November26--> is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の26日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[応徳]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1087年]][[1月3日]]） - [[白河天皇]]が8歳の[[堀河天皇]]に譲位。以後43年間[[太上天皇|上皇]]として[[院政]]を行う * [[治承]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1180年]][[12月14日]]） - [[平清盛]]が都を福原から[[平安京]]に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1260年]][[1月9日]]） - [[後深草天皇]]が、父である[[後嵯峨天皇|後嵯峨上皇]]により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]]）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]]と[[持明院統]]に分裂 * [[文禄]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1594年]][[1月17日]]） - [[後陽成天皇]]の勅命により『[[古文孝経]]』（慶長勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]]本
== 誕生日 == * [[安永]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1780年]][[12月21日]]） - [[黒住宗忠]]、[[黒住教]]始祖（+ [[1850年]]） * [[天明]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1785年]][[1月6日]]） - [[足代弘訓]]、[[国学者]]（+ [[1856年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1556年]][[1月7日]]） - [[織田信光]]、[[武将]]（* [[1516年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月26日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar November]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:赤口]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:November 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]]

== Births == * [[安永]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1780年]][[12月21日]]） - [[黒住宗忠]]、[[黒住教]]始祖（+ [[1850年]]） * [[天明]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1785年]][[1月6日]]） - [[足代弘訓]]、[[国学者]]（+ [[1856年]]）
== Deaths == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1556年]][[1月7日]]） - [[織田信光]]、[[武将]]（* [[1516年]]）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:November 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]] [[zh:十一月廿六]] [[en:draft:November 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[応徳]]3年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1087]][[1月3日]]） - [[白河天皇]]が8歳の[[堀河天皇]]に譲位。以後43年間[[太上天皇|上皇]]として[[院政]]を行う * [[治承]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1180]][[12月14日]]） - [[平清盛]]が都を福原から[[平安京]]に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1260]][[1月9日]]） - [[後深草天皇]]が、父である[[後嵯峨天皇|後嵯峨上皇]]により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]]）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]]と[[持明院統]]に分裂 * [[文禄]]2年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1594]][[1月17日]]） - [[後陽成天皇]]の勅命により『[[古文孝経]]』（慶長勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]]本
== Births == * [[安永]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1780]][[12月21日]]） - [[黒住宗忠]]、[[黒住教]]始祖（+ [[1850]]） * [[天明]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1785]][[1月6日]]） - [[足代弘訓]]、[[国学者]]（+ [[1856]]）
== Deaths == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1556]][[1月7日]]） - [[織田信光]]、[[武将]]（* [[1516]]）

== Events == * [[応徳]]3年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1087]][[1月3日]]） - [[白河天皇]]が8歳の[[堀河天皇]]に譲位。以後43年間[[太上天皇|上皇]]として[[院政]]を行う * [[治承]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1180]][[12月14日]]） - [[平清盛]]が都を福原から[[平安京]]に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1260]][[1月9日]]） - [[後深草天皇]]が、父である[[後嵯峨天皇|後嵯峨上皇]]により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]]）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]]と[[持明院統]]に分裂 * [[文禄]]2nd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1594]][[1月17日]]） - [[後陽成天皇]]の勅命により『[[古文孝経]]』（慶長勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]]本

[[sn:November 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]] [[zh:十一月廿六]] [[en:draft:November 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[応徳]]3rd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1087]][[1月3日]]） - [[白河天皇]]が8歳の[[堀河天皇]]に譲位。以後43年間[[太上天皇|上皇]]として[[院政]]を行う * [[治承]]4th year（ユリウス暦[[1180]][[12月14日]]） - [[平清盛]]が都を福原から[[平安京]]に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1260]][[1月9日]]） - [[後深草天皇]]が、父である[[後嵯峨天皇|後嵯峨上皇]]により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]]）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]]と[[持明院統]]に分裂 * [[文禄]]2nd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1594]][[1月17日]]） - [[後陽成天皇]]の勅命により『[[古文孝経]]』（慶長勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]]本
== Births == * [[安永]]9th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1780]][[12月21日]]） - [[黒住宗忠]]、[[黒住教]]始祖（+ [[1850]]） * [[天明]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1785]][[1月6日]]） - [[足代弘訓]]、[[国学者]]（+ [[1856]]）
== Deaths == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1556]][[1月7日]]） - [[織田信光]]、[[武将]]（* [[1516]]）

[[sn:November 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]] [[zh:十一月廿六]] [[en:draft:November 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[応徳]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1087]] [[1月3日]] ） - [[白河天皇]] が8歳の[[堀河天皇]] に譲位。以後43年間[[太上天皇|上皇]] として[[院政]] を行う * [[治承]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1180]] [[12月14日]] ） - [[平清盛]] が都を福原から[[平安京]] に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1260]] [[1月9日]] ） - [[後深草天皇]] が、父である[[後嵯峨天皇|後嵯峨上皇]] により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]] ）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]] と[[持明院統]] に分裂 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1594]] [[1月17日]] ） - [[後陽成天皇]] の勅命により『[[古文孝経]] 』（Keichō勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]] 本
== Births == * [[安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[12月21日]] ） - [[黒住宗忠]] 、[[黒住教]] 始祖（+ [[1850]] ） * [[天明]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1785]] [[1月6日]] ） - [[足代弘訓]] 、[[国学者]] （+ [[1856]] ）
== Deaths == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1556]] [[1月7日]] ） - [[織田信光]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1516]] ）

== Events == * [[応徳]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1087]] [[January 3]] ） - [[白河天皇]] が8歳の[[堀河天皇]] に譲位。以後43年間[[太上天皇|上皇]] として[[院政]] を行う * [[治承]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1180]] [[December 14]] ） - [[平清盛]] が都を福原から[[平安京]] に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1260]] [[January 9]] ） - [[後深草天皇]] が、父である[[後嵯峨天皇|後嵯峨上皇]] により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]] ）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]] と[[持明院統]] に分裂 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1594]] [[January 17]] ） - [[後陽成天皇]] の勅命により『[[古文孝経]] 』（Keichō勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]] 本
== Births == * [[安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 21]] ） - [[黒住宗忠]] 、[[黒住教]] 始祖（+ [[1850]] ） * [[天明]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1785]] [[January 6]] ） - [[足代弘訓]] 、[[国学者]] （+ [[1856]] ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]] [[zh:十一月廿六]] [[en:draft:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[応徳]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1087]] [[January 3]] ） - [[白河天皇]] が8歳の[[堀河天皇]] に譲位。以後43年間[[太上天皇|上皇]] として[[院政]] を行う * [[治承]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1180]] [[December 14]] ） - [[平清盛]] が都を福原から[[平安京]] に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1260]] [[January 9]] ） - [[後深草天皇]] が、父である[[後嵯峨天皇|後嵯峨上皇]] により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]] ）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]] と[[持明院統]] に分裂 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1594]] [[January 17]] ） - [[後陽成天皇]] の勅命により『[[古文孝経]] 』（Keichō勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]] 本
== Births == * [[安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 21]] ） - [[黒住宗忠]] 、[[黒住教]] 始祖（+ [[1850]] ） * [[天明]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1785]] [[January 6]] ） - [[足代弘訓]] 、[[国学者]] （+ [[1856]] ）
== Deaths == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1556]] [[January 7]] ） - [[織田信光]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1516]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]" to "[[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]]"
revision.text:
[[sn:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]] [[zh:十一月廿六]] [[en:draft:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[応徳]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1087]] [[January 3]] ） - [[白河天皇]] が8歳の[[堀河天皇]] に譲位。以後43年間[[太上天皇|上皇]] として[[院政]] を行う * [[治承]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1180]] [[December 14]] ） - [[平清盛]] が都を福原から[[平安京]] に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1260]] [[January 9]] ） - [[後深草天皇]] が、父である[[後嵯峨天皇|後嵯峨上皇]] により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]] ）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]] と[[持明院統]] に分裂 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1594]] [[January 17]] ） - [[後陽成天皇]] の勅命により『[[古文孝経]] 』（Keichō勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]] 本
== Births == * [[安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 21]] ） - [[黒住宗忠]] 、[[黒住教]] 始祖（+ [[1850]] ） * [[天明]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1785]] [[January 6]] ） - [[足代弘訓]] 、[[国学者]] （+ [[1856]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1556]] [[January 7]] ） - [[織田信光]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1516]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126}}

[[sn:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]] [[zh:十一月廿六]] [[en:draft:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[応徳]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1087]] [[January 3]] ） - [[白河天皇]] が8歳の[[堀河天皇]] に譲位。以後43年間[[太上天皇|上皇]] として[[院政]] を行う * [[治承]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1180]] [[December 14]] ） - [[平清盛]] が都を福原から[[平安京]] に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1260]] [[January 9]] ） - [[後深草天皇]] が、父である[[後嵯峨天皇|後嵯峨上皇]] により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]] ）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]] と[[持明院統]] に分裂 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1594]] [[January 17]] ） - [[後陽成天皇]] の勅命により『[[古文孝経]] 』（Keichō勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]] 本
== Births == * [[安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 21]] ） - [[黒住宗忠]] 、[[黒住教]] 始祖（+ [[1850]] ） * [[天明]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1785]] [[January 6]] ） - [[足代弘訓]] 、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1856]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1556]] [[January 7]] ） - [[織田信光]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1516]] ）

== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1556]] [[January 7]] ） - [[織田信光]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1516]] ）

[[sn:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]] [[zh:十一月廿六]] [[en:draft:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[応徳]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1087]] [[January 3]] ） - [[白河天皇]] が8歳の[[堀河天皇]] に譲位。以後43年間[[太上天皇|上皇]] として[[院政]] を行う * [[治承]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1180]] [[December 14]] ） - [[Taira no Kiyomori]] が都を福原から[[平安京]] に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1260]] [[January 9]] ） - [[後深草天皇]] が、父である[[後嵯峨天皇|後嵯峨上皇]] により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]] ）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]] と[[持明院統]] に分裂 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1594]] [[January 17]] ） - [[後陽成天皇]] の勅命により『[[古文孝経]] 』（Keichō勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]] 本
== Births == * [[安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 21]] ） - [[黒住宗忠]] 、[[黒住教]] 始祖（+ [[1850]] ） * [[天明]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1785]] [[January 6]] ） - [[足代弘訓]] 、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1856]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1556]] [[January 7]] ） - [[織田信光]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1516]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126}}

[[sn:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]] [[zh:十一月廿六]] [[en:draft:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Ōtoku]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1087]] [[January 3]] ） - [[白河天皇]] が8歳の[[堀河天皇]] に譲位。以後43年間[[太上天皇|上皇]] として[[院政]] を行う * [[治承]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1180]] [[December 14]] ） - [[Taira no Kiyomori]] が都を福原から[[平安京]] に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1260]] [[January 9]] ） - [[後深草天皇]] が、父である[[後Emperor Saga|後嵯峨上皇]] により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]] ）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]] と[[持明院統]] に分裂 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1594]] [[January 17]] ） - [[後陽成天皇]] の勅命により『[[古文孝経]] 』（Keichō勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]] 本
== Births == * [[安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 21]] ） - [[黒住宗忠]] 、[[黒住教]] 始祖（+ [[1850]] ） * [[Tenmei]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1785]] [[January 6]] ） - [[足代弘訓]] 、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1856]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1556]] [[January 7]] ） - [[織田信光]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1516]] ）

[[sn:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]] [[zh:十一月廿六]] [[en:draft:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Ōtoku]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1087]] [[January 3]] ） - [[白河天皇]] が8歳の[[堀河天皇]] に譲位。以後43年間[[太上天皇|上皇]] として[[院政]] を行う * [[治承]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1180]] [[December 14]] ） - [[Taira no Kiyomori]] が都を福原から[[平安京]] に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1260]] [[January 9]] ） - [[後深草天皇]] が、父である[[後Emperor Saga|後嵯峨上皇]] により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]] ）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]] と[[持明院統]] に分裂 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1594]] [[January 17]] ） - [[後陽成天皇]] の勅命により『[[古文孝経]] 』（Keichō勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]] 本
== Births == * [[安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 21]] ） - [[黒住宗忠]] 、[[黒住教]] 始祖（+ [[1850]] ） * [[Tenmei]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1785]] [[January 6]] ） - [[足代弘訓]] 、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1856]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1556]] [[January 7]] ） - [[織田信光]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1516]] ） == See Also! ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126}}

[[sn:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]] [[zh:十一月廿六]] [[en:draft:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Ōtoku]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1087]] [[January 3]] ） - [[白河天皇]] が8歳の[[堀河天皇]] に譲位。以後43rd year 間[[太上天皇|上皇]] として[[院政]] を行う * [[治承]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1180]] [[December 14]] ） - [[Taira no Kiyomori]] が都を福原から[[平安京]] に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1260]] [[January 9]] ） - [[後深草天皇]] が、父である[[後Emperor Saga|後嵯峨上皇]] により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]] ）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]] と[[持明院統]] に分裂 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1594]] [[January 17]] ） - [[後陽成天皇]] の勅命により『[[古文孝経]] 』（Keichō勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]] 本
== Births == * [[安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 21]] ） - [[黒住宗忠]] 、[[黒住教]] 始祖（+ [[1850]] ） * [[Tenmei]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1785]] [[January 6]] ） - [[足代弘訓]] 、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1856]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1556]] [[January 7]] ） - [[織田信光]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1516]] ）

[[sn:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]] [[zh:十一月廿六]] [[en:draft:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Ōtoku]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1087]] [[January 3]] ） - [[白河天皇]] が8歳の[[堀河天皇]] に譲位。以後43rd year 間[[太上天皇|上皇]] として[[院政]] を行う * [[治承]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1180]] [[December 14]] ） - [[Taira no Kiyomori]] が都を福原から[[平安京]] に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1260]] [[January 9]] ） - [[後深草天皇]] が、父である[[後Emperor Saga|後嵯峨上皇]] により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]] ）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]] と[[持明院統]] に分裂 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1594]] [[January 17]] ） - [[後陽成天皇]] の勅命により『[[古文孝経]] 』（Keichō勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]] 本
== Births == * [[安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 21]] ） - [[黒住宗忠]] 、[[黒住教]] 始祖（+ [[1850]] ） * [[Tenmei]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1785]] [[January 6]] ） - [[足代弘訓]] 、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1856]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1556]] [[January 7]] ） - [[織田信光]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1516]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126}}

[[sn:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]] [[zh:十一月廿六]] [[en:draft:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Ōtoku]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1087]] [[January 3]] ） - [[白河天皇]] が8歳の[[堀河天皇]] に譲位。以後43rd year 間[[太上天皇|上皇]] として[[院政]] を行う * [[治承]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1180]] [[December 14]] ） - [[Taira no Kiyomori]] が都を福原から[[平安京]] に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1260]] [[January 9]] ） - [[後深草天皇]] が、父である[[後Emperor Saga|後嵯峨上皇]] により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]] ）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]] と[[持明院統]] に分裂 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1594]] [[January 17]] ） - [[後陽成天皇]] の勅命により『[[古文孝経]] 』（Keichō勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]] 本
== Births == * [[安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 21]] ） - [[黒住宗忠]] 、[[黒住教]] 始祖（+ [[1850]] ） * [[Tenmei]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1785]] [[January 6]] ） - [[足代弘訓]] 、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1856]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1556]] [[January 7]] ） - [[織田信光]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1516]] ）

[[sn:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]] [[zh:十一月廿六]] [[en:draft:November 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Ōtoku]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1087]] [[January 3]] ） - [[白河天皇]] が8歳の[[堀河天皇]] に譲位。以後43rd year 間[[太上天皇|上皇]] として[[院政]] を行う * [[治承]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1180]] [[December 14]] ） - [[Taira no Kiyomori]] が都を福原から[[平安京]] に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1260]] [[January 9]] ） - [[後深草天皇]] が、父である[[後Emperor Saga|後嵯峨上皇]] により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]] ）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]] と[[持明院統]] に分裂 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1594]] [[January 17]] ） - [[後陽成天皇]] の勅命により『[[古文孝経]] 』（Keichō勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]] 本
== Births == * [[安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 21]] ） - [[黒住宗忠]] 、[[黒住教]] 始祖（+ [[1850]] ） * [[Tenmei]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1785]] [[January 6]] ） - [[足代弘訓]] 、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1856]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1556]] [[January 7]] ） - [[織田信光]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1516]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126}}

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Ōtoku]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1087]] [[January 3]] ） - [[白河天皇]] が8歳の[[堀河天皇]] に譲位。以後43rd year 間[[太上天皇|上皇]] として[[院政]] を行う * [[治承]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1180]] [[December 14]] ） - [[Taira no Kiyomori]] が都を福原から[[平安京]] に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1260]] [[January 9]] ） - [[後深草天皇]] が、父である[[後Emperor Saga|後嵯峨上皇]] により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]] ）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]] と[[持明院統]] に分裂 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1594]] [[January 17]] ） - [[後陽成天皇]] の勅命により『[[古文孝経]] 』（Keichō勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]] 本
== Births == * [[安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 21]] ） - [[黒住宗忠]] 、[[黒住教]] 始祖（+ [[1850]] ） * [[Tenmei]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1785]] [[January 6]] ） - [[足代弘訓]] 、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1856]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1556]] [[January 7]] ） - [[織田信光]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1516]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}} .
== Events == * [[Ōtoku]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1087]] [[January 3]] ） - [[白河天皇]] が8歳の[[堀河天皇]] に譲位。以後43rd year 間[[太上天皇|上皇]] として[[院政]] を行う * [[治承]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1180]] [[December 14]] ） - [[Taira no Kiyomori]] が都を福原から[[平安京]] に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1260]] [[January 9]] ） - [[後深草天皇]] が、父である[[後Emperor Saga|後嵯峨上皇]] により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]] ）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]] と[[持明院統]] に分裂 * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku|12=draft}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1594]] [[January 17]] ） - [[後陽成天皇]] の勅命により『[[古文孝経]] 』（Keichō勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]] 本
== Births == * [[安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 21]] ） - [[黒住宗忠]] 、[[黒住教]] 始祖（+ [[1850]] ） * [[Tenmei]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1785]] [[January 6]] ） - [[足代弘訓]] 、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1856]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1556]] [[January 7]] ） - [[織田信光]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}} （* [[1516]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126}}

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}}.
== Events == * [[Ōtoku]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1087]] {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日}}) – In this year, Emperor [[Hakuba Tennō|白河天皇]] abdicated in favor of his young successor, who then began his reign as an incumbent emperor while serving as a retired emperor (上皇) during the subsequent period of cloistered rule. * [[Chishō]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1180]] {{ill|December 14|ja|12月14日}}) – Taira no Kiyomori returned the capital from Fukuhara to Heian-kyō. * [[Shōgen (Japan)|Shōgen]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1260]] {{ill|January 9|ja|1月9日}}) – Emperor Go-Fukakusa was forced by his father, former Emperor Go-Saga, to cede the throne to his younger brother, leading to a split in the imperial line between the Daikakuji and Jōmyōin houses. * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1594]] {{ill|January 17|ja|1月17日}}) – By imperial command, the printed edition of the "Kobun-kōkyō" (an edict of Keichō) was produced; this marked the production of Japan’s first wooden movable type printed book.
== Births == * [[An'ei]] 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1780]] {{ill|December 21|ja|12月21日}}) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died [[1850]]). * [[Tenmei]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1785]] {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}}) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[1856]]).
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1556]] {{ill|January 7|ja|1月7日}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光}}, a military commander (born [[1516]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126}}

== Births == * [[An'ei]] 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1780]] {{ill|December 21|ja|12月21日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|12=draft}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died [[1850]]). * [[Tenmei]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1785]] {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=draft}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[1856]]).
== Deaths == * [[Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1556]] {{ill|January 7|ja|1月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光|12=draft}}, a military commander (born [[1516]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月26日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の26日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[応徳]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1087年]][[1月3日]]） - [[白河天皇]]が8歳の[[堀河天皇]]に譲位。以後43年間[[太上天皇|上皇]]として[[院政]]を行う * [[治承]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1180年]][[12月14日]]） - [[平清盛]]が都を福原から[[平安京]]に戻す * [[正元 (日本)|正元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1260年]][[1月9日]]） - [[後深草天皇]]が、父である[[後嵯峨天皇|後嵯峨上皇]]により弟の恒仁親王（[[亀山天皇]]）に譲位させられる。皇位が[[大覚寺統]]と[[持明院統]]に分裂 * [[文禄]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1594年]][[1月17日]]） - [[後陽成天皇]]の勅命により『[[古文孝経]]』（慶長勅版）を印刷。日本初の木製[[活字]]本
== 誕生日 == * [[安永]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1780年]][[12月21日]]） - [[黒住宗忠]]、[[黒住教]]始祖（+ [[1850年]]） * [[天明]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1785年]][[1月6日]]） - [[足代弘訓]]、[[国学者]]（+ [[1856年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1556年]][[1月7日]]） - [[織田信光]]、[[武将]]（* [[1516年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 26일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月廿六]][[zh:十一月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840854]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 26|qq=November 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Ōtoku|Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1087|1087]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – In this year, Emperor [[Hakuba Tennō|白河天皇]] abdicated in favor of his young successor, who then began his reign as an incumbent emperor while serving as a retired emperor (上皇) during the subsequent period of cloistered rule. * [[Chishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – Taira no Kiyomori returned the capital from Fukuhara to Heian-kyō. * [[Shōgen (Japan)|Shōgen]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1260|1260]] [[:en:January 9|January 9]]) – Emperor Go-Fukakusa was forced by his father, former Emperor Go-Saga, to cede the throne to his younger brother, leading to a split in the imperial line between the Daikakuji and Jōmyōin houses. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1594|1594]] [[:en:January 17|January 17]]) – By imperial command, the printed edition of the "Kobun-kōkyō" (an edict of Keichō) was produced; this marked the production of Japan’s first wooden movable type printed book. == Births == * [[:en:An'ei|An'ei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 21|December 21]]) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurozumi Sōchū|qq=|1=Kurozumi Munetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678013}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died [[:en:1850|1850]]). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1785|1785]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]]) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashiro Hirokun|qq=|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1856|1856]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 7|January 7]]) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobuhiro|qq=|1=Oda Nobumitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608264}}, a military commander (born [[:en:1516|1516]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Ōtoku|Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1087|1087]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – In this year, Emperor [[Hakuba Tennō|白河天皇]] abdicated in favor of his young successor, who then began his reign as an incumbent emperor while serving as a retired emperor (上皇) during the subsequent period of cloistered rule. * [[Chishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – Taira no Kiyomori returned the capital from Fukuhara to Heian-kyō. * [[Shōgen (Japan)|Shōgen]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1260|1260]] [[:en:January 9|January 9]]) – Emperor Go-Fukakusa was forced by his father, former Emperor Go-Saga, to cede the throne to his younger brother, leading to a split in the imperial line between the Daikakuji and Jōmyōin houses. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1594|1594]] [[:en:January 17|January 17]]) – By imperial command, the printed edition of the "Kobun-kōkyō" (an edict of Keichō) was produced; this marked the production of Japan’s first wooden movable type printed book. == Births == * [[:en:An'ei|An'ei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 21|December 21]]) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurozumi Sōchū|qq=|1=Kurozumi Munetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678013}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died [[:en:1850|1850]]). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1785|1785]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]]) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashiro Hirokun|qq=|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1856|1856]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 7|January 7]]) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobuhiro|qq=|1=Oda Nobumitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608264}}, a military commander (born [[:en:1516|1516]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿六]][[zh:十一月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840854]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 26|qq=November 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Ōtoku|Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1087|1087]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – In this year, Emperor [[Hakuba Tennō|白河天皇]] abdicated in favor of his young successor, who then began his reign as an incumbent emperor while serving as a retired emperor (上皇) during the subsequent period of cloistered rule. * [[Chishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – Taira no Kiyomori returned the capital from Fukuhara to Heian-kyō. * [[Shōgen (Japan)|Shōgen]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1260|1260]] [[:en:January 9|January 9]]) – Emperor Go-Fukakusa was forced by his father, former Emperor Go-Saga, to cede the throne to his younger brother, leading to a split in the imperial line between the Daikakuji and Jōmyōin houses. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1594|1594]] [[:en:January 17|January 17]]) – By imperial command, the printed edition of the "Kobun-kōkyō" (an edict of Keichō) was produced; this marked the production of Japan’s first wooden movable type printed book. == Births == * [[:en:An'ei|An'ei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 21|December 21]]) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurozumi Sōchū|1=Kurozumi Munetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678013}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died [[:en:1850|1850]]). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1785|1785]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]]) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashiro Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1856|1856]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 7|January 7]]) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobuhiro|1=Oda Nobumitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608264}}, a military commander (born [[:en:1516|1516]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿六]][[zh:十一月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840854]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 26|qq=November 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Ōtoku|Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1087|1087]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – In this year, Emperor [[Hakuba Tennō|白河天皇]] abdicated in favor of his young successor, who then began his reign as an incumbent emperor while serving as a retired emperor (上皇) during the subsequent period of cloistered rule. * [[Chishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – Taira no Kiyomori returned the capital from Fukuhara to Heian-kyō. * [[Shōgen (Japan)|Shōgen]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1260|1260]] [[:en:January 9|January 9]]) – Emperor Go-Fukakusa was forced by his father, former Emperor Go-Saga, to cede the throne to his younger brother, leading to a split in the imperial line between the Daikakuji and Jōmyōin houses. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1594|1594]] [[:en:January 17|January 17]]) – By imperial command, the printed edition of the "Kobun-kōkyō" (an edict of Keichō) was produced; this marked the production of Japan’s first wooden movable type printed book. == Births == * [[:en:An'ei|An'ei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 21|December 21]]) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurozumi Sōchū|1=Kurozumi Munetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678013}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died [[:en:1850|1850]]). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1785|1785]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]]) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashiro Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1856|1856]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 7|January 7]]) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobuhiro|1=Oda Nobumitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608264}}, a military commander (born [[:en:1516|1516]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿六]]
{{translated page|ja|11月26日 (旧暦)|version=93859869|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Ōtoku|Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1087|1087]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – In this year, Emperor [[Hakuba Tennō|白河天皇]] abdicated in favor of his young successor, who then began his reign as an incumbent emperor while serving as a retired emperor (上皇) during the subsequent period of cloistered rule. * [[Chishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – Taira no Kiyomori returned the capital from Fukuhara to Heian-kyō. * [[Shōgen (Japan)|Shōgen]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1260|1260]] [[:en:January 9|January 9]]) – Emperor Go-Fukakusa was forced by his father, former Emperor Go-Saga, to cede the throne to his younger brother, leading to a split in the imperial line between the Daikakuji and Jōmyōin houses. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1594|1594]] [[:en:January 17|January 17]]) – By imperial command, the printed edition of the "Kobun-kōkyō" (an edict of Keichō) was produced; this marked the production of Japan’s first wooden movable type printed book. == Births == * [[:en:An'ei|An'ei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 21|December 21]]) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurozumi Sōchū|1=Kurozumi Munetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678013}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died [[:en:1850|1850]]). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1785|1785]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]]) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashiro Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1856|1856]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 7|January 7]]) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobuhiro|1=Oda Nobumitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608264}}, a military commander (born [[:en:1516|1516]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿六]][[zh:十一月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840854]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 26|qq=November 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Ōtoku|Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1087|1087]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – In this year, Emperor [[Hakuba Tennō|白河天皇]] abdicated in favor of his young successor, who then began his reign as an incumbent emperor while serving as a retired emperor (上皇) during the subsequent period of cloistered rule. * [[Chishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – Taira no Kiyomori returned the capital from Fukuhara to Heian-kyō. * [[Shōgen (Japan)|Shōgen]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1260|1260]] [[:en:January 9|January 9]]) – Emperor Go-Fukakusa was forced by his father, former Emperor Go-Saga, to cede the throne to his younger brother, leading to a split in the imperial line between the Daikakuji and Jōmyōin houses. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1594|1594]] [[:en:January 17|January 17]]) – By imperial command, the printed edition of the "Kobun-kōkyō" (an edict of Keichō) was produced; this marked the production of Japan’s first wooden movable type printed book. == Births == * [[:en:An'ei|An'ei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 21|December 21]]) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurozumi Sōchū|1=Kurozumi Munetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678013}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died [[:en:1850|1850]]). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1785|1785]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]]) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashiro Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1856|1856]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 7|January 7]]) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobuhiro|1=Oda Nobumitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608264}}, a military commander (born [[:en:1516|1516]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 26일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月廿六]][[zh:十一月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 26일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月廿六]][[zh:十一月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿六]][[zh:十一月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840854]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 26|qq=November 26}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Ōtoku|Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1087|1087]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – In this year, Emperor [[Hakuba Tennō|白河天皇]] abdicated in favor of his young successor, who then began his reign as an incumbent emperor while serving as a retired emperor (上皇) during the subsequent period of cloistered rule. * [[Chishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – Taira no Kiyomori returned the capital from Fukuhara to Heian-kyō. * [[Shōgen (Japan)|Shōgen]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1260|1260]] [[:en:January 9|January 9]]) – Emperor Go-Fukakusa was forced by his father, former Emperor Go-Saga, to cede the throne to his younger brother, leading to a split in the imperial line between the Daikakuji and Jōmyōin houses. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1594|1594]] [[:en:January 17|January 17]]) – By imperial command, the printed edition of the "Kobun-kōkyō" (an edict of Keichō) was produced; this marked the production of Japan’s first wooden movable type printed book. == Births == * [[:en:An'ei|An'ei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 21|December 21]]) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurozumi Sōchū|1=Kurozumi Munetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678013}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died [[:en:1850|1850]]). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1785|1785]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]]) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashiro Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1856|1856]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 7|January 7]]) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobuhiro|1=Oda Nobumitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608264}}, a military commander (born [[:en:1516|1516]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Ōtoku|Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1087|1087]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – In this year, Emperor [[Hakuba Tennō|白河天皇]] abdicated in favor of his young successor, who then began his reign as an incumbent emperor while serving as a retired emperor (上皇) during the subsequent period of cloistered rule. * [[Chishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – Taira no Kiyomori returned the capital from Fukuhara to Heian-kyō. * [[Shōgen (Japan)|Shōgen]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1260|1260]] [[:en:January 9|January 9]]) – Emperor Go-Fukakusa was forced by his father, former Emperor Go-Saga, to cede the throne to his younger brother, leading to a split in the imperial line between the Daikakuji and Jōmyōin houses. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1594|1594]] [[:en:January 17|January 17]]) – By imperial command, the printed edition of the "Kobun-kōkyō" (an edict of Keichō) was produced; this marked the production of Japan’s first wooden movable type printed book. == Births == * [[:en:An'ei|An'ei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 21|December 21]]) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurozumi Sōchū|1=Kurozumi Munetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678013}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died [[:en:1850|1850]]). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1785|1785]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]]) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashiro Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1856|1856]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 7|January 7]]) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobuhiro|1=Oda Nobumitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608264}}, a military commander (born [[:en:1516|1516]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Ōtoku|Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1087|1087]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – In this year, Emperor [[Hakuba Tennō|白河天皇]] abdicated in favor of his young successor, who then began his reign as an incumbent emperor while serving as a retired emperor (上皇) during the subsequent period of cloistered rule. * [[Chishō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – Taira no Kiyomori returned the capital from Fukuhara to Heian-kyō. * [[Shōgen (Japan)|Shōgen]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1260|1260]] [[:en:January 9|January 9]]) – Emperor Go-Fukakusa was forced by his father, former Emperor Go-Saga, to cede the throne to his younger brother, leading to a split in the imperial line between the Daikakuji and Jōmyōin houses. * [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1594|1594]] [[:en:January 17|January 17]]) – By imperial command, the printed edition of the "Kobun-kōkyō" (an edict of Keichō) was produced; this marked the production of Japan’s first wooden movable type printed book. == Births == * [[:en:An'ei|An'ei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 21|December 21]]) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurozumi Sōchū|1=Kurozumi Munetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678013}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died [[:en:1850|1850]]). * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1785|1785]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]]) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashiro Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died [[:en:1856|1856]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 7|January 7]]) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobuhiro|1=Oda Nobumitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608264}}, a military commander (born [[:en:1516|1516]]).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿六]][[zh:十一月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿六]][[zh:十一月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿六]][[zh:十一月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840854]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 26|qq=November 26}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Ōtoku|en|Ōtoku|WD=Q264214|lt=Ōtoku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1087|en|1087|WD=Q19461|lt=1087}} {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|WD=Q2156|lt=January 3}}) – In this year, Emperor [[Hakuba Tennō|白河天皇]] abdicated in favor of his young successor, who then began his reign as an incumbent emperor while serving as a retired emperor (上皇) during the subsequent period of cloistered rule. * [[Chishō]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1180|en|1180|WD=Q19702|lt=1180}} {{ill|December 14|en|December 14|WD=Q2382|lt=December 14}}) – Taira no Kiyomori returned the capital from Fukuhara to Heian-kyō. * [[Shōgen (Japan)|Shōgen]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1260|en|1260|WD=Q5508|lt=1260}} {{ill|January 9|en|January 9|WD=Q2238|lt=January 9}}) – Emperor Go-Fukakusa was forced by his father, former Emperor Go-Saga, to cede the throne to his younger brother, leading to a split in the imperial line between the Daikakuji and Jōmyōin houses. * {{ill|Bunroku|en|Bunroku|WD=Q1373039|lt=Bunroku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1594|en|1594|WD=Q6777|lt=1594}} {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|WD=Q2264|lt=January 17}}) – By imperial command, the printed edition of the "Kobun-kōkyō" (an edict of Keichō) was produced; this marked the production of Japan’s first wooden movable type printed book. == Births == * {{ill|An'ei|en|An'ei|WD=Q1193910|lt=An'ei}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1780|en|1780|WD=Q7716|lt=1780}} {{ill|December 21|en|December 21|WD=Q2603|lt=December 21}}) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurozumi Sōchū|1=Kurozumi Munetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678013}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died {{ill|1850|en|1850|WD=Q7653|lt=1850}}). * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|WD=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1785|en|1785|WD=Q7756|lt=1785}} {{ill|January 6|en|January 6|WD=Q2221|lt=January 6}}) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashiro Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died {{ill|1856|en|1856|WD=Q7676|lt=1856}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1143910|lt=Kōji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1556|en|1556|WD=Q6590|lt=1556}} {{ill|January 7|en|January 7|WD=Q2228|lt=January 7}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobuhiro|1=Oda Nobumitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608264}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1516|en|1516|WD=Q6212|lt=1516}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Ōtoku|en|Ōtoku|WD=Q264214|lt=Ōtoku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1087|en|1087|WD=Q19461|lt=1087}} {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|WD=Q2156|lt=January 3}}) – In this year, Emperor [[Hakuba Tennō|白河天皇]] abdicated in favor of his young successor, who then began his reign as an incumbent emperor while serving as a retired emperor (上皇) during the subsequent period of cloistered rule. * [[Chishō]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1180|en|1180|WD=Q19702|lt=1180}} {{ill|December 14|en|December 14|WD=Q2382|lt=December 14}}) – Taira no Kiyomori returned the capital from Fukuhara to Heian-kyō. * [[Shōgen (Japan)|Shōgen]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1260|en|1260|WD=Q5508|lt=1260}} {{ill|January 9|en|January 9|WD=Q2238|lt=January 9}}) – Emperor Go-Fukakusa was forced by his father, former Emperor Go-Saga, to cede the throne to his younger brother, leading to a split in the imperial line between the Daikakuji and Jōmyōin houses. * {{ill|Bunroku|en|Bunroku|WD=Q1373039|lt=Bunroku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1594|en|1594|WD=Q6777|lt=1594}} {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|WD=Q2264|lt=January 17}}) – By imperial command, the printed edition of the "Kobun-kōkyō" (an edict of Keichō) was produced; this marked the production of Japan’s first wooden movable type printed book. == Births == * {{ill|An'ei|en|An'ei|WD=Q1193910|lt=An'ei}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1780|en|1780|WD=Q7716|lt=1780}} {{ill|December 21|en|December 21|WD=Q2603|lt=December 21}}) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurozumi Sōchū|1=Kurozumi Munetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678013}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died {{ill|1850|en|1850|WD=Q7653|lt=1850}}). * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|WD=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1785|en|1785|WD=Q7756|lt=1785}} {{ill|January 6|en|January 6|WD=Q2221|lt=January 6}}) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashiro Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died {{ill|1856|en|1856|WD=Q7676|lt=1856}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1143910|lt=Kōji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1556|en|1556|WD=Q6590|lt=1556}} {{ill|January 7|en|January 7|WD=Q2228|lt=January 7}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobuhiro|1=Oda Nobumitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608264}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1516|en|1516|WD=Q6212|lt=1516}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Ōtoku|en|Ōtoku|WD=Q264214|lt=Ōtoku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1087|en|1087|WD=Q19461|lt=1087}} {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|WD=Q2156|lt=January 3}}) – In this year, Emperor [[Hakuba Tennō|白河天皇]] abdicated in favor of his young successor, who then began his reign as an incumbent emperor while serving as a retired emperor (上皇) during the subsequent period of cloistered rule. * [[Chishō]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1180|en|1180|WD=Q19702|lt=1180}} {{ill|December 14|en|December 14|WD=Q2382|lt=December 14}}) – Taira no Kiyomori returned the capital from Fukuhara to Heian-kyō. * [[Shōgen (Japan)|Shōgen]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1260|en|1260|WD=Q5508|lt=1260}} {{ill|January 9|en|January 9|WD=Q2238|lt=January 9}}) – Emperor Go-Fukakusa was forced by his father, former Emperor Go-Saga, to cede the throne to his younger brother, leading to a split in the imperial line between the Daikakuji and Jōmyōin houses. * {{ill|Bunroku|en|Bunroku|WD=Q1373039|lt=Bunroku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1594|en|1594|WD=Q6777|lt=1594}} {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|WD=Q2264|lt=January 17}}) – By imperial command, the printed edition of the "Kobun-kōkyō" (an edict of Keichō) was produced; this marked the production of Japan’s first wooden movable type printed book. == Births == * {{ill|An'ei|en|An'ei|WD=Q1193910|lt=An'ei}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1780|en|1780|WD=Q7716|lt=1780}} {{ill|December 21|en|December 21|WD=Q2603|lt=December 21}}) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurozumi Sōchū|1=Kurozumi Munetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678013}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died {{ill|1850|en|1850|WD=Q7653|lt=1850}}). * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|WD=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1785|en|1785|WD=Q7756|lt=1785}} {{ill|January 6|en|January 6|WD=Q2221|lt=January 6}}) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashiro Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died {{ill|1856|en|1856|WD=Q7676|lt=1856}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1143910|lt=Kōji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1556|en|1556|WD=Q6590|lt=1556}} {{ill|January 7|en|January 7|WD=Q2228|lt=January 7}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobuhiro|1=Oda Nobumitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608264}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1516|en|1516|WD=Q6212|lt=1516}}).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Ōtoku|en|Ōtoku|WD=Q264214|lt=Ōtoku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1087|en|1087|WD=Q19461|lt=1087}} {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|WD=Q2156|lt=January 3}}) – In this year, Emperor [[Hakuba Tennō|白河天皇]] abdicated in favor of his young successor, who then began his reign as an incumbent emperor while serving as a retired emperor (上皇) during the subsequent period of cloistered rule. * [[Chishō]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1180|en|1180|WD=Q19702|lt=1180}} {{ill|December 14|en|December 14|WD=Q2382|lt=December 14}}) – Taira no Kiyomori returned the capital from Fukuhara to Heian-kyō. * [[Shōgen (Japan)|Shōgen]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1260|en|1260|WD=Q5508|lt=1260}} {{ill|January 9|en|January 9|WD=Q2238|lt=January 9}}) – Emperor Go-Fukakusa was forced by his father, former Emperor Go-Saga, to cede the throne to his younger brother, leading to a split in the imperial line between the Daikakuji and Jōmyōin houses. * {{ill|Bunroku|en|Bunroku|WD=Q1373039|lt=Bunroku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1594|en|1594|WD=Q6777|lt=1594}} {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|WD=Q2264|lt=January 17}}) – By imperial command, the printed edition of the "Kobun-kōkyō" (an edict of Keichō) was produced; this marked the production of Japan’s first wooden movable type printed book. == Births == * {{ill|An'ei|en|An'ei|WD=Q1193910|lt=An'ei}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1780|en|1780|WD=Q7716|lt=1780}} {{ill|December 21|en|December 21|WD=Q2603|lt=December 21}}) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurozumi Sōchū|1=Kurozumi Munetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678013}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died {{ill|1850|en|1850|WD=Q7653|lt=1850}}). * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|WD=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1785|en|1785|WD=Q7756|lt=1785}} {{ill|January 6|en|January 6|WD=Q2221|lt=January 6}}) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashiro Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died {{ill|1856|en|1856|WD=Q7676|lt=1856}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1143910|lt=Kōji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1556|en|1556|WD=Q6590|lt=1556}} {{ill|January 7|en|January 7|WD=Q2228|lt=January 7}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobuhiro|1=Oda Nobumitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608264}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1516|en|1516|WD=Q6212|lt=1516}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|25|11|27|10|26|12|11|1126|qq=}}
