{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Ōtoku|en|Ōtoku|WD=Q264214|lt=Ōtoku|1=Ōtoku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1087|en|1087|WD=Q19461|lt=1087|1=1087}} {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|WD=Q2156|lt=January 3|1=January 3}}) – In this year, Emperor [[Hakuba Tennō|白河天皇]] abdicated in favor of his young successor, who then began his reign as an incumbent emperor while serving as a retired emperor (上皇) during the subsequent period of cloistered rule. * [[Chishō]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1180|en|1180|WD=Q19702|lt=1180|1=1180}} {{ill|December 14|en|December 14|WD=Q2382|lt=December 14|1=December 14}}) – Taira no Kiyomori returned the capital from Fukuhara to Heian-kyō. * [[Shōgen (Japan)|Shōgen]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1260|en|1260|WD=Q5508|lt=1260|1=1260}} {{ill|January 9|en|January 9|WD=Q2238|lt=January 9|1=January 9}}) – Emperor Go-Fukakusa was forced by his father, former Emperor Go-Saga, to cede the throne to his younger brother, leading to a split in the imperial line between the Daikakuji and Jōmyōin houses. * {{ill|Bunroku|en|Bunroku|WD=Q1373039|lt=Bunroku|1=Bunroku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1594|en|1594|WD=Q6777|lt=1594|1=1594}} {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|WD=Q2264|lt=January 17|1=January 17}}) – By imperial command, the printed edition of the "Kobun-kōkyō" (an edict of Keichō) was produced; this marked the production of Japan’s first wooden movable type printed book. == Births == * {{ill|An'ei|en|An'ei|WD=Q1193910|lt=An'ei|1=An'ei}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1780|en|1780|WD=Q7716|lt=1780|1=1780}} {{ill|December 21|en|December 21|WD=Q2603|lt=December 21|1=December 21}}) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurozumi Sōchū|1=Kurozumi Munetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678013}}, the founder of the Kurozumi school of Confucian thought (died {{ill|1850|en|1850|WD=Q7653|lt=1850|1=1850}}). * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|WD=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1785|en|1785|WD=Q7756|lt=1785|1=1785}} {{ill|January 6|en|January 6|WD=Q2221|lt=January 6|1=January 6}}) – {{ill|Ashiro Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashiro Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a Kokugaku scholar (died {{ill|1856|en|1856|WD=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1143910|lt=Kōji|1=Kōji (Muromachi period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1556|en|1556|WD=Q6590|lt=1556|1=1556}} {{ill|January 7|en|January 7|WD=Q2228|lt=January 7|1=January 7}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhiro|ja|織田信光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobuhiro|1=Oda Nobumitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11608264}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1516|en|1516|WD=Q6212|lt=1516|1=1516}}).
